Laptops.brand: String. Extract the brand name (e.g., HP, Dell, Lenovo).
Laptops.series: String. Extract the model family/series (e.g., Victus, Latitude, ThinkPad).
Laptops.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Laptops.processor_brand: String. Extract full CPU brand(e.g Intel, AMD
Laptops.processor_name: String. Extract the full CPU name (e.g., Core i7-13700H, Ryzen 7 5800H).
Laptops.processor_speed_ghz: Float. Extract the base or max clock speed in GHz.
Laptops.processor_cache_mb: Integer. Extract the CPU cache size in MB.
Laptops.ram_gb: Integer. Total installed RAM in GB.
Laptops.ram_type: String. Extract the RAM generation (e.g., DDR4, DDR5).
Laptops.max_ram_gb: Integer. Extract the maximum supported RAM in GB if listed.
Laptops.storage_ssd_gb: Integer. Total SSD storage in GB (convert 1TB to 1024).
Laptops.storage_hdd_gb: Integer. Total HDD storage in GB (convert 1TB to 1024).
Laptops.has_optical_drive: Boolean. True if a CD/DVD/Optical drive is explicitly mentioned.
Laptops.graphics_card_brand: String. Extract full GPU brand(e.g NNvidia, Intel, AMD
Laptops.graphics_card_name: String. Extract the full GPU name (e.g., RTX 4060, Iris Xe).
Laptops.graphics_memory_gb: Integer. Dedicated GPU memory in GB (Return null for integrated graphics).
Laptops.has_wifi: Boolean. True if Wi-Fi is mentioned.
Laptops.has_bluetooth: Boolean. True if Bluetooth is mentioned.
Laptops.has_lan: Boolean. True if LAN, RJ45, or Ethernet is mentioned.
Laptops.has_hdmi: Boolean. True if HDMI is mentioned.
Laptops.has_vga: Boolean. True if VGA is mentioned.
Laptops.has_usb_type_c: Boolean. True if USB-C or Thunderbolt is mentioned.
Laptops.has_usb_type_a: Boolean. True if standard USB (2.0, 3.0, 3.1, 3.2) is mentioned.
Laptops.supports_docking: Boolean. True if docking station support is explicitly mentioned.
Laptops.has_webcam: Boolean. True if a webcam or camera is mentioned.
Laptops.has_backlit_keyboard: Boolean. True if the keyboard is backlit.
Laptops.is_spill_resistant: Boolean. True if the keyboard is spill-resistant.
Laptops.has_fingerprint_reader: Boolean. True if a fingerprint reader or biometric security is mentioned.
Laptops.audio_features: String. Extract any specific branded audio details.
Laptops.battery_wh: Float. Extract the battery capacity in Watt-hours (Wh) or cells.
Laptops.power_supply_w: Float. Extract the AC adapter/power supply wattage in Watts.

Chargers.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Chargers.max_output_w: Float. Extract absolute MAXIMUM total output wattage. Calculate V * A = W if needed.
Chargers.max_input_v: Float. Extract the maximum supported input voltage (e.g., 240 for 100-240V).
Chargers.has_pd: Boolean. True if Power Delivery (PD) is explicitly mentioned.
Chargers.has_pps: Boolean. True if Programmable Power Supply (PPS) is mentioned.
Chargers.has_qc: Boolean. True if Quick Charge (QC) is mentioned.
Chargers.total_ports: Integer. Total number of charging output ports.
Chargers.ports_type_c: Integer. Extract the exact number of USB-C / Type-C ports.
Chargers.ports_usb_a: Integer. Extract the exact number of USB-A ports.
Chargers.is_gan: Boolean. True if GaN (Gallium Nitride) technology is mentioned.
Chargers.has_wireless_charging: Boolean. True if it supports wireless or MagSafe charging.
Chargers.includes_cable: Boolean. True if the charger comes with a cable.
Chargers.plug_type: String. Extract the wall plug standard if mentioned.

Smartwatches.has_calling: Boolean. True if it supports Bluetooth calling.
Smartwatches.is_waterproof: Boolean. True if it explicitly mentions IP rating or waterproof.

Data Cables.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Data Cables.connector_in: String. Extract the input connector type (e.g., USB-A, USB-C).
Data Cables.connector_out: String. Extract the output connector type (e.g., USB-C, Lightning, Micro-USB).
Data Cables.max_current_a: Float. Extract the maximum supported current in Amps (e.g., 3A, 5A).
Data Cables.max_power_w: Float. Extract maximum supported wattage. Calculate V * A = W if needed.
Data Cables.data_transfer_mbps: Integer. Extract data transfer speed in Mbps (Convert Gbps to Mbps).
Data Cables.length_m: Float. Extract cable length in meters. Convert cm/feet to meters.
Data Cables.material: String. Extract the primary build material.
Data Cables.has_digital_display: Boolean. True if the cable features a built-in display.
Data Cables.is_magnetic: Boolean. True if it is a magnetic detachable charging cable.

Multifunction Adapters.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Multifunction Adapters.host_interface: String. Extract the connector that plugs into the computer/phone.
Multifunction Adapters.total_ports: Integer. Total number of expansion ports on the adapter.
Multifunction Adapters.ports_usb_a: Integer. Exact number of USB-A ports.
Multifunction Adapters.ports_type_c: Integer. Exact number of USB-C data ports.
Multifunction Adapters.has_hdmi: Boolean. True if an HDMI port is included.
Multifunction Adapters.max_hdmi_resolution: String. Extract the maximum supported display resolution and refresh rate.
Multifunction Adapters.has_vga: Boolean. True if a VGA port is included.
Multifunction Adapters.supports_pd_passthrough: Boolean. True if it supports PD passthrough charging.
Multifunction Adapters.max_pd_w: Float. Extract the maximum PD passthrough wattage.
Multifunction Adapters.has_ethernet: Boolean. True if an RJ45/Ethernet/LAN port is included.
Multifunction Adapters.has_sd_reader: Boolean. True if an SD or TF/MicroSD card reader is included.
Multifunction Adapters.has_audio_jack: Boolean. True if a 3.5mm audio jack is included.
Multifunction Adapters.cable_length_m: Float. Extract the length of the built-in host cable in meters, if applicable.

Convertors.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Convertors.is_bidirectional: Boolean. True if the converter works in both directions.
Convertors.max_video_resolution: String. Extract the maximum supported display resolution if it's a video converter.
Convertors.data_transfer_mbps: Integer. Extract data transfer speed in Mbps if it's a data converter.
Convertors.has_audio_passthrough: Boolean. True if the converter explicitly mentions carrying audio.
Convertors.supports_pd_passthrough: Boolean. True if it supports Power Delivery (PD) charging.
Convertors.cable_length_m: Float. Extract the length of the cable in meters.

Mix Gadgets.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Mix Gadgets.gadget_type: String. Classify into ONE of: [Monitor Mount, Barcode Scanner, Presenter/Laser Pointer, E-Scooter/Rideable, Smart Home Device, Other Electronics, Non-Electronic Accessory].
Mix Gadgets.is_rechargeable: Boolean. True if the item has a rechargeable battery.
Mix Gadgets.power_consumption_w: Float. Extract max power consumption, wattage, or motor power in Watts.
Mix Gadgets.connection_type: String. MUST be one of: [Wired USB, Bluetooth, Wireless 2.4GHz, Wi-Fi, None].
Mix Gadgets.max_load_kg: Float. Extract the maximum weight capacity/load in kilograms.
Mix Gadgets.ip_rating: String. Extract the waterproof/dustproof IP rating if available.
Mix Gadgets.has_display_screen: Boolean. True if the gadget has an LCD, OLED, or LED display screen.

Stereo Handsfree.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Stereo Handsfree.connector_type: String. MUST be one of: [3.5mm Jack, USB-C, Lightning, 2.5mm Jack].
Stereo Handsfree.cable_length_m: Float. Extract the cable/cord length in meters.
Stereo Handsfree.wearing_style: String. MUST be one of: [In-Ear, Half-Ear, Earbud].
Stereo Handsfree.driver_size_mm: Float. Extract the speaker/driver unit diameter in millimeters.
Stereo Handsfree.impedance_ohms: Integer. Extract the AC Impedance or Resistance in Ohms (Ω).
Stereo Handsfree.sensitivity_db: Integer. Extract the audio sensitivity in Decibels (dB).
Stereo Handsfree.has_microphone: Boolean. True if it has a built-in mic.
Stereo Handsfree.has_inline_controls: Boolean. True if it has volume controls or a multi-function button on the wire.
Stereo Handsfree.has_anc: Boolean. True if it explicitly features Active Noise Cancellation (ANC).

Ring Lights.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Ring Lights.ring_diameter_inches: Float. Extract the outer diameter of the ring light in inches.
Ring Lights.includes_tripod: Boolean. True if it comes with a tripod stand.
Ring Lights.includes_phone_holder: Boolean. True if it comes with a mount/holder for a smartphone.
Ring Lights.has_adjustable_color_temp: Boolean. True if it mentions adjustable color temperatures.
Ring Lights.has_rgb: Boolean. True if it mentions RGB or multi-color modes.
Ring Lights.power_source: String. MUST be one of: [USB, AC Power/Wall Plug, Battery].
Ring Lights.has_remote_control: Boolean. True if an inline remote or wireless remote control is included.

Gaming Accessories.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Gaming Accessories.gaming_device_type: String. Classify into ONE of: [Mouse, Keyboard, Headset, Controller, Cooling Pad/Fan, Other].
Gaming Accessories.connection_type: String. MUST be one of: [Wired, Wireless 2.4GHz, Bluetooth, Dual-Mode].
Gaming Accessories.has_rgb: Boolean. True if it features RGB, LED, or backlit lighting.
Gaming Accessories.max_dpi: Integer. Extract the maximum DPI/CPI resolution for mice.
Gaming Accessories.polling_rate_hz: Integer. Extract the polling rate or report rate in Hz.
Gaming Accessories.number_of_buttons: Integer. Total number of programmable buttons or keys.
Gaming Accessories.switch_type: String. Extract the mechanical switch type or keycap technology.
Gaming Accessories.switch_lifespan_millions: Float. Extract the key/micro-switch lifespan in millions of clicks.
Gaming Accessories.driver_size_mm: Float. Extract the speaker/driver unit diameter in millimeters.
Gaming Accessories.has_microphone: Boolean. True if it includes a built-in microphone.

Laptop Stands & Cooling Pads.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Laptop Stands & Cooling Pads.max_laptop_size_inches: Float. Extract the maximum supported laptop size in inches.
Laptop Stands & Cooling Pads.number_of_fans: Integer. Extract the total number of cooling fans. Output 0 if it is just a stand.
Laptop Stands & Cooling Pads.is_adjustable: Boolean. True if the height or viewing angle is adjustable.
Laptop Stands & Cooling Pads.has_rgb: Boolean. True if it mentions RGB or LED lighting.
Laptop Stands & Cooling Pads.material: String. Extract the primary build material.
Laptop Stands & Cooling Pads.weight_g: Integer. Extract the weight of the stand/pad in grams.

Bluetooth Handsfree.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Bluetooth Handsfree.playtime_hours: Float. Extract the maximum music/play time in hours on a single charge.
Bluetooth Handsfree.battery_capacity_buds_mah: Integer. Extract the battery capacity of a single earbud in mAh.
Bluetooth Handsfree.battery_capacity_case_mah: Integer. Extract the battery capacity of the charging case in mAh.
Bluetooth Handsfree.driver_size_mm: Float. Extract the speaker/driver size in millimeters.
Bluetooth Handsfree.has_anc: Boolean. True if Active Noise Cancellation (ANC) is explicitly featured.
Bluetooth Handsfree.has_enc: Boolean. True if Environmental Noise Cancellation (ENC) or clear call tech is mentioned.
Bluetooth Handsfree.ip_rating: String. Extract the waterproof/dustproof IP rating.

General.weight_kg: Float. Extract weight in kilograms if available.
General.power_w: Float. Extract general wattage if applicable.

Keyboards and Mouse.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Keyboards and Mouse.device_type: String. Classify into ONE of: [Keyboard, Mouse, Combo].
Keyboards and Mouse.connection_type: String. MUST be one of: [Wired, Wireless 2.4GHz, Bluetooth, Dual-Mode].
Keyboards and Mouse.has_rgb: Boolean. True if it explicitly features RGB, LED, or backlit lighting.
Keyboards and Mouse.is_mechanical: Boolean. True if the keyboard uses mechanical switches.
Keyboards and Mouse.switch_type: String. Extract the switch color/type (e.g., Blue, Red, Brown, Membrane).
Keyboards and Mouse.number_of_keys: Integer. Total number of keys on the keyboard (e.g., 104, 87, 61).
Keyboards and Mouse.max_dpi: Integer. Extract the maximum DPI/CPI resolution for mice.
Keyboards and Mouse.number_of_buttons: Integer. Total number of buttons on the mouse.
Keyboards and Mouse.polling_rate_hz: Integer. Extract the polling rate in Hz (e.g., 1000).
Keyboards and Mouse.cable_length_m: Float. Extract the cable length in meters.
Keyboards and Mouse.battery_life_days: Float. Extract battery life in days for wireless devices (convert hours/months to days).

Speakers and Headphones.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Speakers and Headphones.device_type: String. Classify into ONE of: [Portable Speaker, Desktop/Multimedia Speaker, Soundbar, Over-Ear Headphones, On-Ear Headphones].
Speakers and Headphones.connection_type: String. MUST be one of: [Wired, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, Multi-Mode].
Speakers and Headphones.audio_output_power_w: Float. Extract the RMS or maximum audio output power in Watts (Crucial for speakers).
Speakers and Headphones.driver_size_mm: Float. Extract the speaker/driver unit diameter in millimeters.
Speakers and Headphones.impedance_ohms: Integer. Extract the AC Impedance or Resistance in Ohms (Ω).
Speakers and Headphones.frequency_response_min_hz: Integer. Extract the LOWEST number in the frequency response range (e.g., 20 from 20Hz-20kHz).
Speakers and Headphones.frequency_response_max_hz: Integer. Extract the HIGHEST number in the frequency response range (e.g., 20000 from 20Hz-20kHz. Convert kHz to Hz).
Speakers and Headphones.playtime_hours: Float. Extract the maximum music/play time in hours on a single charge.
Speakers and Headphones.has_microphone: Boolean. True if it has a built-in microphone for calls.
Speakers and Headphones.has_anc: Boolean. True if Active Noise Cancellation (ANC) is explicitly featured.
Speakers and Headphones.ip_rating: String. Extract the waterproof/dustproof IP rating (e.g., IPX7, IP67).

Extension Leads & Smart Switches.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Extension Leads & Smart Switches.total_ac_outlets: Integer. Total number of standard AC power sockets.
Extension Leads & Smart Switches.total_usb_ports: Integer. Total number of USB charging ports (Combine USB-A and USB-C).
Extension Leads & Smart Switches.max_power_w: Float. Extract the maximum rated power in Watts (e.g., 2500W, 3200W).
Extension Leads & Smart Switches.max_current_a: Float. Extract the maximum rated current in Amps (e.g., 10A, 16A).
Extension Leads & Smart Switches.cable_length_m: Float. Extract the power cord length in meters.
Extension Leads & Smart Switches.is_smart_device: Boolean. True if Wi-Fi, App control, or Voice control (Alexa/Google) is explicitly mentioned.
Extension Leads & Smart Switches.has_surge_protection: Boolean. True if surge, overload, or lightning protection is mentioned.

Mobile Holders.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Mobile Holders.holder_type: String. Classify into ONE of: [Car Mount, Desk Stand, Bike/Motorcycle Mount, Tripod/Selfie Stick, Ring/Pop Socket].
Mobile Holders.mounting_mechanism: String. Classify into ONE of: [Magnetic/MagSafe, Clamp/Grip, Suction Cup, Adhesive, Air Vent Clip].
Mobile Holders.has_wireless_charging: Boolean. True if it doubles as a wireless charger.
Mobile Holders.is_adjustable: Boolean. True if it explicitly mentions 360-degree rotation, tilt, or telescopic arms.
Mobile Holders.material: String. Extract the primary build material.

Multifunction Hubs & Docks.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Multifunction Hubs & Docks.host_interface: String. Extract the connector that plugs into the computer/phone (e.g., USB-C, USB-A).
Multifunction Hubs & Docks.total_ports: Integer. Total number of expansion ports on the adapter.
Multifunction Hubs & Docks.ports_usb_a: Integer. Exact number of USB-A ports.
Multifunction Hubs & Docks.ports_type_c: Integer. Exact number of USB-C data ports.
Multifunction Hubs & Docks.has_hdmi: Boolean. True if an HDMI port is included.
Multifunction Hubs & Docks.max_hdmi_resolution: String. Extract the maximum supported display resolution and refresh rate (e.g., 4K@60Hz, 1080p).
Multifunction Hubs & Docks.has_vga: Boolean. True if a VGA port is included.
Multifunction Hubs & Docks.supports_pd_passthrough: Boolean. True if the adapter supports Power Delivery (PD) passthrough charging.
Multifunction Hubs & Docks.max_pd_w: Float. Extract the maximum PD passthrough wattage.
Multifunction Hubs & Docks.has_ethernet: Boolean. True if an RJ45/Ethernet/LAN port is included.
Multifunction Hubs & Docks.has_sd_reader: Boolean. True if an SD or TF/MicroSD card reader is included.
Multifunction Hubs & Docks.has_audio_jack: Boolean. True if a 3.5mm audio jack is included.
Multifunction Hubs & Docks.cable_length_m: Float. Extract the length of the built-in host cable in meters, if applicable.

USB Cards & Devices.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
USB Cards & Devices.device_type: String. Classify into ONE of: [Wi-Fi Adapter, Bluetooth Adapter, Sound Card, Video Capture Card, USB Expansion Card, Other].
USB Cards & Devices.host_interface: String. Extract the connector that plugs into the computer (e.g., USB-A, USB-C, PCIe).
USB Cards & Devices.wireless_standard: String. Extract Wi-Fi or Bluetooth generation if applicable (e.g., Wi-Fi 6, Bluetooth 5.0).
USB Cards & Devices.max_speed_mbps: Integer. Extract maximum data or network speed in Mbps.
USB Cards & Devices.has_antenna: Boolean. True if it features an external antenna.

Card Readers.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Card Readers.host_interface: String. Extract the connector that plugs into the computer/phone (e.g., USB-A, USB-C, Lightning).
Card Readers.supported_card_formats: String. Extract the types of memory cards supported (e.g., SD, MicroSD, TF, CF).
Card Readers.number_of_slots: Integer. Total number of card slots available.
Card Readers.max_read_speed_mbps: Integer. Extract maximum read speed in MB/s or Mbps (Convert MB/s to Mbps by multiplying by 8 if you want strict Mbps, or just state the number).
Card Readers.is_otg_supported: Boolean. True if it supports OTG (On-The-Go) for mobile phones.

Android BOX & Screen Mirror.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Android BOX & Screen Mirror.device_type: String. Classify into ONE of: [Android TV Box, Screen Mirroring Dongle/AnyCast].
Android BOX & Screen Mirror.max_video_resolution: String. Extract the maximum supported display resolution and refresh rate (e.g., 4K@60Hz, 8K, 1080p).
Android BOX & Screen Mirror.os_version: String. Extract the operating system version (e.g., Android 11, Android TV 10).
Android BOX & Screen Mirror.processor_chipset: String. Extract the CPU/Chipset model if listed (e.g., Amlogic S905X4, Rockchip).
Android BOX & Screen Mirror.ram_gb: Integer. Total installed RAM in GB.
Android BOX & Screen Mirror.storage_gb: Integer. Total internal storage (ROM/Flash) in GB.
Android BOX & Screen Mirror.has_wifi: Boolean. True if Wi-Fi is mentioned (usually Dual Band 2.4/5G).
Android BOX & Screen Mirror.has_bluetooth: Boolean. True if Bluetooth is mentioned.
Android BOX & Screen Mirror.has_ethernet: Boolean. True if an RJ45/LAN port is included.
Android BOX & Screen Mirror.includes_remote: Boolean. True if it comes with a remote control.

Recording Accessories.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Recording Accessories.device_type: String. Classify into ONE of: [Wireless Presenter/Laser Pointer, Microphone/Audio Recorder, Other].
Recording Accessories.connection_type: String. MUST be one of: [Wired, Wireless USB Receiver, Bluetooth].
Recording Accessories.connector_in: String. Extract the connector type if it plugs into a device (e.g., USB-A, USB-C, 3.5mm, Lightning).
Recording Accessories.control_distance_m: Float. Extract the maximum wireless control or laser distance in meters.
Recording Accessories.laser_color: String. Extract the laser pointer color if applicable (e.g., Red, Green).
Recording Accessories.power_source: String. Extract the battery type (e.g., Rechargeable, AAA Battery).

USB Hubs.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
USB Hubs.host_interface: String. Extract the connector that plugs into the computer (e.g., USB-A, USB-C).
USB Hubs.total_usb_ports: Integer. Total number of USB expansion ports.
USB Hubs.ports_usb_a: Integer. Exact number of USB-A ports.
USB Hubs.ports_type_c: Integer. Exact number of USB-C data ports.
USB Hubs.max_data_speed_mbps: Integer. Extract maximum data transfer speed in Mbps (e.g., 5Gbps = 5000).
USB Hubs.has_external_power_input: Boolean. True if the hub has a dedicated power input port (DC or PD) to power multiple heavy devices.
USB Hubs.cable_length_m: Float. Extract the length of the built-in cable in meters.

Power Banks.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Power Banks.capacity_mah: Integer. Highest advertised capacity in mAh.
Power Banks.max_input_w: Float. Extract ONLY the max input wattage. Do NOT confuse with output.
Power Banks.max_output_w: Float. Extract ONLY the max output wattage. IF given in Volts and Amps, calculate V * A = W. Do NOT confuse with input.
Power Banks.total_ports: Integer. Total number of charging output ports (USB-A + USB-C).
Power Banks.has_wireless_charging: Boolean. True if it supports magnetic or wireless charging.
Power Banks.has_built_in_cable: Boolean. True if it has built-in charging cables.
Power Banks.is_solar_powered: Boolean. True if it features solar charging panels.

Tripods & Selfie Sticks.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Tripods & Selfie Sticks.device_type: String. Classify into ONE of: [Tripod, Selfie Stick, Gimbal/Stabilizer, Vlogging Kit].
Tripods & Selfie Sticks.max_extended_length_cm: Integer. Extract the maximum extended length in centimeters. (Convert inches or meters to cm).
Tripods & Selfie Sticks.folded_length_cm: Integer. Extract the folded/collapsed length in centimeters.
Tripods & Selfie Sticks.max_load_kg: Float. Extract the maximum weight capacity/load in kilograms.
Tripods & Selfie Sticks.material: String. Extract the primary build material (e.g., Aluminum, Carbon Fiber, ABS).
Tripods & Selfie Sticks.has_bluetooth_remote: Boolean. True if it includes a wireless Bluetooth shutter remote.
Tripods & Selfie Sticks.has_fill_light: Boolean. True if it has a built-in ring light or fill light.
Tripods & Selfie Sticks.is_gimbal_stabilizer: Boolean. True if it features active motor stabilization (Gimbal).

Network Adapters & Accessories.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Network Adapters & Accessories.device_type: String. Classify into ONE of: [Wi-Fi Adapter, Ethernet/LAN Adapter, Bluetooth Adapter].
Network Adapters & Accessories.host_interface: String. Extract the connector that plugs into the computer (e.g., USB-A, USB-C, PCIe).
Network Adapters & Accessories.wireless_standard: String. Extract Wi-Fi or Bluetooth generation if applicable (e.g., Wi-Fi 6, 802.11ac, Bluetooth 5.3).
Network Adapters & Accessories.max_network_speed_mbps: Integer. Extract maximum network speed in Mbps (Convert Gbps to Mbps, e.g., 1Gbps = 1000).
Network Adapters & Accessories.number_of_antennas: Integer. Total number of external antennas.
Network Adapters & Accessories.antenna_gain_dbi: Float. Extract the antenna gain in dBi if mentioned.
Network Adapters & Accessories.has_bluetooth: Boolean. True if a Wi-Fi adapter also includes Bluetooth functionality.

Smart Projectors.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Smart Projectors.native_resolution: String. Extract the TRUE optical native resolution (e.g., 1080p, 720p, 4K). Do not confuse with 'supported' resolution.
Smart Projectors.max_supported_resolution: String. Extract the maximum supported decoding resolution.
Smart Projectors.brightness_lumens: Integer. Extract the brightness in Lumens or ANSI Lumens.
Smart Projectors.lamp_life_hours: Integer. Extract the expected lamp/bulb life in hours.
Smart Projectors.max_projection_size_inches: Integer. Extract the maximum projection screen size in inches.
Smart Projectors.os_version: String. Extract the smart operating system (e.g., Android 9.0, Android TV).
Smart Projectors.ram_gb: Integer. Total installed RAM in GB.
Smart Projectors.storage_gb: Integer. Total internal storage (ROM) in GB.
Smart Projectors.has_wifi: Boolean. True if Wi-Fi or wireless screen mirroring is supported.
Smart Projectors.has_auto_keystone: Boolean. True if it explicitly mentions Auto Keystone correction.
Smart Projectors.has_built_in_speaker: Boolean. True if it has built-in audio/speakers.

External Enclosures.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
External Enclosures.supported_drive_size: String. Classify into ONE of: [2.5-inch, 3.5-inch, M.2, Mixed].
External Enclosures.supported_drive_interface: String. Classify into ONE of: [SATA, NVMe, SATA/NVMe Dual].
External Enclosures.host_interface: String. Extract the connector that plugs into the computer (e.g., USB-C, USB-A).
External Enclosures.max_speed_gbps: Integer. Extract maximum data transfer speed in Gbps (e.g., 5, 10, 20, 40).
External Enclosures.max_capacity_tb: Integer. Extract the maximum supported drive capacity in Terabytes (TB).
External Enclosures.material: String. Extract the primary build material (e.g., Aluminum, Transparent PC, ABS).
External Enclosures.is_tool_free: Boolean. True if it explicitly mentions tool-free or plug-and-play installation.

Laptop Bags.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Laptop Bags.bag_type: String. Classify into ONE of: [Backpack, Sleeve, Briefcase/Messenger, Hard Case].
Laptop Bags.max_laptop_size_inches: Float. Extract the maximum supported laptop size in inches (e.g., 15.6, 17.3, 14.0).
Laptop Bags.material: String. Extract the primary build material (e.g., Polyester, Nylon, Leather, Neoprene).
Laptop Bags.is_water_resistant: Boolean. True if it explicitly mentions being waterproof, water-resistant, or splash-proof.

SSDs.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
SSDs.storage_gb: Integer. Total storage capacity in GB (Convert TB to GB, e.g., 1TB = 1024, 2TB = 2048).
SSDs.form_factor: String. Classify into ONE of: [2.5-inch, M.2 2280, M.2 2230, Portable/External, mSATA].
SSDs.interface: String. Classify into ONE of: [SATA III, PCIe 3.0 NVMe, PCIe 4.0 NVMe, PCIe 5.0 NVMe, USB-C].
SSDs.max_read_speed_mbps: Integer. Extract maximum read speed in MB/s.
SSDs.max_write_speed_mbps: Integer. Extract maximum write speed in MB/s.
SSDs.is_external: Boolean. True if it is a portable/external SSD rather than an internal drive.

Softwares.brand: String. Extract the software developer/brand (e.g., Microsoft, Adobe, Kaspersky).
Softwares.software_type: String. Classify into ONE of: [Operating System, Antivirus/Security, Office/Productivity, Design/Creative, Utility, Other].
Softwares.license_duration_months: Integer. Extract the duration of the license in months. Use 999 for Lifetime/Perpetual licenses (e.g., 1 Year = 12).
Softwares.number_of_devices: Integer. Extract the number of PCs/Devices the license covers.
Softwares.delivery_method: String. Classify into ONE of: [Digital Download/Key, Physical USB/CD Box].
Softwares.os_compatibility: String. Extract the supported OS (e.g., Windows 11, macOS, Android).

Graphic Tablets.brand: String. Extract the brand name (e.g., Wacom, Huion, XP-Pen).
Graphic Tablets.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Graphic Tablets.has_display_screen: Boolean. True if it is a pen display (has a built-in monitor). False if it is a standard drawing pad.
Graphic Tablets.active_area_diagonal_inches: Float. Extract the active drawing area diagonal in inches. (Convert cm to inches if necessary).
Graphic Tablets.pressure_levels: Integer. Extract the pen pressure sensitivity levels (e.g., 4096, 8192).
Graphic Tablets.resolution_lpi: Integer. Extract the reading resolution in LPI (Lines Per Inch).
Graphic Tablets.report_rate_pps: Integer. Extract the report rate in PPS or RPS (Points/Reports Per Second).
Graphic Tablets.has_tilt_support: Boolean. True if the pen supports tilt recognition.
Graphic Tablets.is_wireless: Boolean. True if the tablet supports wireless/Bluetooth connectivity.
Graphic Tablets.number_of_shortcut_keys: Integer. Total number of customizable express/shortcut keys/buttons.
Graphic Tablets.includes_pen: Boolean. True if a stylus/pen is included in the box.

Smart Watches & Bands.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Smart Watches & Bands.device_type: String. Classify into ONE of: [Smartwatch, Fitness Band/Tracker].
Smart Watches & Bands.panel_type: String. Extract the display panel tech if mentioned (e.g., AMOLED, OLED, LCD, IPS).
Smart Watches & Bands.battery_life_days: Float. Extract the maximum advertised battery life in days (convert hours to days).
Smart Watches & Bands.has_calling: Boolean. True if it supports Bluetooth calling or has a built-in mic/speaker.
Smart Watches & Bands.has_gps: Boolean. True if it features built-in standalone GPS.
Smart Watches & Bands.has_heart_rate_monitor: Boolean. True if it tracks heart rate.
Smart Watches & Bands.has_spo2_monitor: Boolean. True if it explicitly tracks Blood Oxygen / SpO2.
Smart Watches & Bands.is_waterproof: Boolean. True if it explicitly mentions an IP rating or ATM water resistance (e.g., IP68, 5ATM).

Gaming Sticks.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Gaming Sticks.number_of_built_in_games: Integer. Total number of pre-installed games (e.g., 10000).
Gaming Sticks.max_video_resolution: String. Extract the maximum supported display resolution (e.g., 4K, 1080p).
Gaming Sticks.storage_gb: Integer. Total internal storage or included TF/MicroSD card capacity in GB.
Gaming Sticks.ram_gb: Integer. Total installed RAM in GB.
Gaming Sticks.is_wireless_controller: Boolean. True if the included controllers are wireless.
Gaming Sticks.supported_emulators: String. Extract the list of supported console emulators if mentioned (e.g., PS1, GBA, MAME).

Smart Cameras.model: String. Extract the specific model number.
Smart Cameras.camera_type: String. Classify into ONE of: [Indoor Security, Outdoor Security, Action Camera, Dash Cam, Webcam].
Smart Cameras.max_video_resolution: String. Extract the maximum video capture resolution (e.g., 1080p, 2K, 4K).
Smart Cameras.field_of_view_degrees: Integer. Extract the lens viewing angle or field of view in degrees.
Smart Cameras.has_night_vision: Boolean. True if infrared (IR) or color night vision is mentioned.
Smart Cameras.has_motion_detection: Boolean. True if it explicitly mentions motion detection or tracking.
Smart Cameras.has_two_way_audio: Boolean. True if it has both a mic and speaker for two-way talk.
Smart Cameras.supports_sd_card: Boolean. True if it supports local TF/MicroSD card storage.
Smart Cameras.is_ptz: Boolean. True if it supports Pan-Tilt-Zoom (PTZ) motor rotation.
Smart Cameras.ip_rating: String. Extract the waterproof/dustproof IP rating if available (e.g., IP65, IP66).

Batteries.model: String. Extract the specific model number or replacement part number.
Batteries.battery_form_factor: String. Classify into ONE of: [Replacement/Custom, AA, AAA, 18650, Coin Cell, Power Tool, Other Standard].
Batteries.battery_chemistry: String. Extract the chemistry (e.g., Lithium-Ion, NiMH, Alkaline, Li-Polymer).
Batteries.capacity_mah: Integer. Extract battery capacity in mAh.
Batteries.voltage_v: Float. Extract the battery voltage in Volts.
Batteries.energy_wh: Float. Extract the energy capacity in Watt-hours (Wh) if provided.
Batteries.number_of_cells: Integer. Extract the cell count if it's a laptop battery (e.g., 3-cell, 6-cell).
Batteries.is_rechargeable: Boolean. True if the battery is rechargeable.
